nasb.text: “What profit is there in my blood, if I go down to the pit? Will the dust praise You? Will it declare Your faithfulness?

esv.text: “What profit is there in my death, if I go down to the pit? Will the dust praise you? Will it tell of your faithfulness?

cnv.text: “我被害流血，下到深坑，有甚麼益處呢？ 塵土還能稱讚你，還能傳揚你的信實嗎？

ccb.text: “耶和华啊， 我被毁灭、落入坟墓有何益处？ 我归于尘土，还能赞美你、 宣扬你的信实吗？

csbs.text: “我死亡下到阴坑，有什么好处呢？ 难道尘土会称谢你，宣告你的信实吗？
